name: Tweaks

enableExplainerFix.label: Explainer fix
enableExplainerFix.description: Refresh pulsing explainer hints after language changes and use readable light text in the void.

enableEndingSkip.label: Ending skip
enableEndingSkip.description: Show a skip button during the pinhole ending and credits sequence.

enableAccessibilityButtons.label: Accessibility buttons
enableAccessibilityButtons.description: Show the bottom accessibility control bar and reality-floor color palette.

label.sch: 资源和绘线显示在变暗遮罩上方
label.modsch: 资源和绘线显示在变暗遮罩上方
label.tch: 資源和繪線顯示在變暗遮罩上方

description.en: Draw resource UI and resource/chasm lines above the reduced-flashes dark overlay with the Render API on or off. Turning this off keeps the vanilla order where the overlay darkens them.
description.sch: 无论渲染 API 开启或关闭，都让资源 UI、资源来源绘线和逆裂缝绘线显示在 reduced flashes 的变暗遮罩上方。关闭此选项时保持原版顺序，由遮罩压暗它们。
description.modsch: 无论渲染 API 开启或关闭，都让资源 UI、资源来源绘线和逆裂缝绘线显示在 reduced flashes 的变暗遮罩上方。关闭此选项时保持原版顺序，由遮罩压暗它们。
description.tch: 無論渲染 API 開啟或關閉，都讓資源 UI、資源來源繪線和逆裂縫繪線顯示在 reduced flashes 的變暗遮罩上方。關閉此選項時保持原版順序，由遮罩壓暗它們。

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: Stabilizer surge flash reduction
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: After the void altar exists, hide full-screen flashes caused by stabilizer-triggered surge effects.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Disable gradient mine flash
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Prevent Gradient mine Reality conversion lightning from filling the screen, while keeping the lightning path, sound, and resource production.

disableIdleSplash.label: Disable offline earnings simulation
disableIdleSplash.description: Skip the offline earnings simulation when loading a save. Time spent away will grant no offline resources or other simulated progress.

label.es: Vista previa del alcance del scan
label.jp: スキャン範囲プレビュー
label.thai: ตัวอย่างระยะสแกน

description.en: When placing the supercritical kernel, show the actual scan radius instead of the generic 3x3 building range.
description.sch: 放置超临界内核时，显示实际扫描范围，而不是通用的3x3建筑范围。
description.modsch: 放置超临界内核时，显示实际扫描范围，而不是通用的3x3建筑范围。
description.tch: 放置超臨界內核時，顯示實際掃描範圍，而不是通用的3x3建築範圍。
description.ru: При размещении сверхкритического ядра показывает настоящий радиус сканирования вместо обычной зоны 3x3.
description.de: Zeigt beim Platzieren des Supercritical Kernel den echten Scanradius statt der normalen 3x3-Baureichweite.
description.ptbr: Ao posicionar o nucleo supercritico, mostra o alcance real do scan em vez da area comum 3x3.
description.it: Quando posizioni il nucleo supercritico, mostra il vero raggio di scan invece dell'area generica 3x3.
description.es: Al colocar el nucleo supercritico, muestra el alcance real del scan en vez del rango generico 3x3.
description.fr: Lors du placement du noyau supercritique, affiche la vraie portee du scan au lieu de la zone 3x3 generique.
description.nl: Toont bij het plaatsen van de superkritieke kern het echte scanbereik in plaats van het gewone 3x3-bereik.
description.cz: Pri umisteni superkritickeho jadra zobrazi skutecny dosah skenu misto obecne oblasti 3x3.
description.pl: Podczas stawiania jadra superkrytycznego pokazuje prawdziwy zasieg skanu zamiast zwyklego obszaru 3x3.
description.jp: 超臨界核を配置するとき、通常の3x3範囲ではなく実際のスキャン範囲を表示します。
description.kr: 초임계 코어를 배치할 때 일반 3x3 범위 대신 실제 스캔 범위를 표시합니다.
description.thai: เมื่อวางแกนเหนือวิกฤต จะแสดงระยะสแกนจริงแทนระยะอาคาร 3x3 ทั่วไป
description.hu: A szuperkritikus mag elhelyezesekor a valodi szkennelési tartomanyt mutatja az altalanos 3x3 helyett.
description.lv: Novietojot superkritisko kodolu, rada isto skanesanas diapazonu, nevis parasto 3x3 buvesanas zonu.
description.ro: La plasarea nucleului supercritic, arata raza reala de scanare in locul zonei generice 3x3.
description.no: Nar du plasserer den superkritiske kjernen, vises den faktiske skannerekkevidden i stedet for vanlig 3x3-byggerekkevidde.

label.es: Correccion del desplazamiento de la tienda
label.jp: ショップスクロール固定修正
label.thai: แก้การยึดตำแหน่งเลื่อนร้านค้า

description.en: Keeps Q-copy and shop-card focus scrolling inside the shop panel so the whole game view does not shift or expose a bottom white line.
description.sch: 将 Q 复制和商店卡片聚焦滚动限制在商店面板内，避免整个游戏画面上移并露出底部白边。
description.modsch: 将 Q 复制和商店卡片聚焦滚动限制在商店面板内，避免整个游戏画面上移并露出底部白边。
description.tch: 將 Q 複製和商店卡片聚焦滾動限制在商店面板內，避免整個遊戲畫面上移並露出底部白邊。
description.ru: Ограничивает прокрутку при Q-копировании и фокусе карточек панелью магазина, чтобы весь экран игры не сдвигался и не показывал белую линию снизу.
description.de: Begrenzt das Scrollen beim Q-Kopieren und beim Fokussieren von Shop-Karten auf das Shopfeld, damit die Spielansicht nicht nach oben rutscht.
description.ptbr: Mantem a rolagem do copiar com Q e do foco dos cartoes dentro do painel da loja, evitando que a tela suba e mostre uma linha branca inferior.
description.it: Mantiene lo scorrimento di copia con Q e del focus delle schede dentro il pannello negozio, evitando lo spostamento della schermata.
description.es: Mantiene el desplazamiento de copiar con Q y del enfoque de tarjetas dentro del panel de tienda para evitar que la vista suba y deje una linea blanca abajo.
description.fr: Garde le defilement de copie Q et de focus des cartes dans le panneau boutique afin que la vue du jeu ne remonte pas.
description.nl: Houdt Q-kopie en kaartfocus-scrollen binnen het winkelpaneel zodat het spelbeeld niet omhoog schuift.
description.cz: Drzi rolovani pri kopirovani Q a zamerovani karet uvnitr panelu obchodu, aby se cela hra neposunula nahoru.
description.pl: Utrzymuje przewijanie kopiowania Q i fokusu kart wewnatrz panelu sklepu, aby widok gry nie przesuwal sie w gore.
description.jp: Qコピーやショップカードへのフォーカス時のスクロールをショップ内に限定し、画面全体のずれと下部の白線を防ぎます。
description.kr: Q 복사와 상점 카드 포커스 스크롤을 상점 패널 안으로 제한해 화면 전체가 위로 밀리거나 하단 흰 줄이 보이지 않게 합니다.
description.thai: จำกัดการเลื่อนจากการคัดลอกด้วย Q และการโฟกัสการ์ดให้อยู่ในแผงร้านค้า เพื่อไม่ให้ภาพเกมขยับขึ้นและเกิดเส้นขาวด้านล่าง
description.hu: A Q masolas es a boltkartya fokusz gorgeteset a boltpanelen belul tartja, igy a jatekkep nem csuszik fel.
description.lv: Notur Q kopesanas un veikala kartisu fokusa ritinasanu veikala paneli, lai speles skats nepabiditos uz augsu.
description.ro: Pastreaza derularea pentru copierea cu Q si focalizarea cardurilor in panoul magazinului, ca imaginea jocului sa nu urce.
description.no: Holder Q-kopiering og kortfokus-rulling inne i butikkpanelet slik at spillbildet ikke skyves opp.

label.sch: 梯度矿井搬迁到穿刺点修复
label.modsch: 梯度矿井搬迁到穿刺点修复
label.tch: 梯度礦井搬遷到穿刺點修復
label.ptbr: Correcao de realocar mina gradiente ao puncture
label.it: Correzione spostamento miniera gradiente su puncture
label.es: Correccion de traslado de mina gradiente al puncture
label.fr: Correctif deplacement mine gradient vers puncture
label.cz: Oprava presunu gradientniho dolu na puncture
label.pl: Naprawa przenoszenia kopalni gradientowej na puncture
label.jp: 勾配鉱山の穿刺点移動修正
label.thai: แก้การย้ายเหมือง Gradient ไปยังจุด Puncture
label.ro: Corectie mutare mina gradient pe puncture
label.no: Fiks flytting av gradientgruve til puncture

description.en: Allows relocating an existing Gradient mine onto a Puncture point, matching the vanilla build-upgrade behavior that already allows building Gradient directly on Puncture.
description.sch: 允许将现有梯度矿井搬迁到穿刺点上，和原版已经允许直接在穿刺点上建造梯度矿井的行为保持一致。
description.modsch: 允许将现有梯度矿井搬迁到穿刺点上，和原版已经允许直接在穿刺点上建造梯度矿井的行为保持一致。
description.tch: 允許將現有梯度礦井搬遷到穿刺點上，和原版已經允許直接在穿刺點上建造梯度礦井的行為保持一致。
description.ru: Разрешает переносить существующую градиентную шахту на точку прокола, как уже позволяет обычное строительство-улучшение.
description.de: Erlaubt das Verschieben einer bestehenden Gradientmine auf eine Punktur, passend zum Vanilla-Bauupgrade.
description.ptbr: Permite realocar uma mina gradiente existente para um puncture, igual ao upgrade de construcao original.
description.it: Permette di spostare una miniera gradiente esistente su un puncture, come gia consente l upgrade di costruzione originale.
description.es: Permite trasladar una mina gradiente existente a un puncture, igual que la mejora de construccion original.
description.fr: Permet de deplacer une mine gradient existante sur un puncture, comme le permet deja l amelioration de construction vanilla.
description.nl: Staat toe een bestaande gradientmijn naar een puncture te verplaatsen, net als de vanilla bouw-upgrade.
description.cz: Umoznuje presunout existujici gradientni dul na puncture, stejne jako puvodni stavebni vylepseni.
description.pl: Pozwala przeniesc istniejaca kopalnie gradientowa na puncture, tak jak pozwala na to oryginalne ulepszenie budowy.
description.jp: 既存の勾配鉱山を穿刺点へ移動できるようにし、穿刺点上に直接建てられる原版のアップグレード挙動と揃えます。
description.kr: 기존 그래디언트 광산을 천공점 위로 옮길 수 있게 해, 원래 건설 업그레이드 동작과 맞춥니다.
description.thai: อนุญาตให้ย้ายเหมือง Gradient ที่มีอยู่ไปบนจุด Puncture ให้ตรงกับพฤติกรรมอัปเกรดการสร้างของเกมเดิม
description.hu: Engedi a meglevo gradientbanya athelyezeset puncture pontra, az eredeti epitasi fejlesztes viselkedesehez igazodva.
description.lv: Atlauj parvietot esosu gradienta raktuvi uz puncture punktu, tapat ka to atlauj pamata buvesanas uzlabojums.
description.ro: Permite mutarea unei mine gradient existente pe un puncture, la fel ca imbunatatirea de construire originala.
description.no: Lar en eksisterende gradientgruve flyttes til et puncture-punkt, likt den opprinnelige byggeoppgraderingen.

label.en: Keep Gradient mine penalty when relocating
label.sch: 搬迁梯度矿井时保留惩罚值
label.modsch: 搬迁梯度矿井时保留惩罚值
label.tch: 搬遷梯度礦井時保留懲罰值
label.ru: Сохранять штраф градиентной шахты при переносе
label.ptbr: Manter penalidade da mina gradiente ao realocar
label.it: Mantieni penalita miniera gradiente nello spostamento
label.es: Mantener penalizacion de mina gradiente al trasladar
label.fr: Conserver la penalite de la mine gradient au deplacement
label.cz: Zachovat penalizaci gradientniho dolu pri presunu
label.pl: Zachowaj kare kopalni gradientowej przy przenoszeniu
label.jp: 勾配鉱山移動時のペナルティ保持
label.kr: 그래디언트 광산 이동 시 패널티 유지
label.thai: คงค่าโทษของเหมือง Gradient เมื่อย้าย
label.ro: Pastreaza penalizarea minei gradient la mutare

description.en: Prevents the E-key relocation flow from forcing an existing Gradient mine penalty back to 0.5.
description.sch: 防止使用 E 快捷键搬迁现有梯度矿井时，原有 penalty 被原版强制改回 0.5。
description.modsch: 防止使用 E 快捷键搬迁现有梯度矿井时，原有 penalty 被原版强制改回 0.5。
description.tch: 防止使用 E 快捷鍵搬遷現有梯度礦井時，原有 penalty 被原版強制改回 0.5。
description.ru: Не дает переносу через E принудительно сбрасывать штраф существующей градиентной шахты до 0.5.
description.de: Verhindert, dass das Verschieben per E die bestehende Gradientminen-Strafe auf 0.5 zuruecksetzt.
description.ptbr: Impede que a realocacao pela tecla E force a penalidade de uma mina gradiente existente para 0.5.
description.it: Impedisce allo spostamento con E di riportare a 0.5 la penalita di una miniera gradiente esistente.
description.es: Evita que el traslado con E fuerce a 0.5 la penalizacion de una mina gradiente existente.
description.fr: Empeche le deplacement avec E de remettre a 0.5 la penalite dune mine gradient existante.
description.nl: Voorkomt dat verplaatsen met E de penalty van een bestaande gradientmijn naar 0.5 terugzet.
description.cz: Zabrani tomu, aby presun klavesou E vratil penalizaci existujiciho gradientniho dolu na 0.5.
description.pl: Zapobiega wymuszaniu kary 0.5 dla istniejacej kopalni gradientowej podczas przenoszenia klawiszem E.
description.jp: Eキー移動で既存の勾配鉱山のペナルティが0.5へ強制的に戻るのを防ぎます。
description.kr: E 키 이동 시 기존 그래디언트 광산의 penalty가 0.5로 강제로 돌아가는 것을 막습니다.
description.thai: ป้องกันไม่ให้การย้ายด้วยปุ่ม E บังคับค่า penalty ของเหมือง Gradient เดิมกลับเป็น 0.5
description.hu: Megakadalyozza, hogy az E billentyus athelyezes a meglevo gradientbanya bunteteset 0.5-re allitsa vissza.
description.lv: Nelauj E taustina parvietosanai piespiedu karta atiestatit esosas gradienta raktuves sodu uz 0.5.
description.ro: Impiedica mutarea cu tasta E sa forteze penalizarea unei mine gradient existente inapoi la 0.5.
description.no: Hindrer at flytting med E tvinger straffen til en eksisterende gradientgruve tilbake til 0.5.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Skip void return fade
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: When returning from the void to reality, remove the long white recovery fade and show the clear view immediately.

enableResourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow colors
enableResourceGlowColors.description: Color resource icon glows by resource, with optional per-resource overrides.

resourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow palette
resourceGlowColors.description: Per-resource glow color overrides. Empty rows use each resource's native color.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Chasm line renderer
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Allow this mod to replace the chasm-to-resource lines with the selected renderer.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Chasm line rendering mode
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D uses the original game drawing. WebGL renders the same chasm-to-resource curves through a GPU-backed canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Chasm lines ignore distance
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Keep rendering chasm-to-resource lines even when the chasm is outside the normal visible range.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Floor grid outlines
enableFloorGridLines.description: Draw thin outlines around the in-game floor cells.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Reality floor grid outline color
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Leave empty to use the default dark gray outline in reality.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Void floor grid outline color
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Leave empty to use the default white outline in the void.

description.sch: 同时缓存受损 Cube：保留资源偏移，并将逐资源抖动近似为整张缓存图的轻微抖动。若要保留原版受损 Cube 的精确抖动，请关闭此项。

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: Play time counter
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: Show the active run play-time counter on the game canvas.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Play time counter position
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

0.thai: มุมซ้ายล่าง

1.thai: กึ่งกลางด้านบน

2.thai: มุมขวาล่าง

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Disable Shift/Ctrl zoom shortcut
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Prevent pressing Shift or Ctrl alone from resetting the camera zoom, while keeping Shift/Ctrl + wheel zooming available.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Dynamic camera
enableDynamicCamera.description: Enable keyboard-controlled camera pitch and rotation.

cameraPitch.label: Camera pitch
cameraPitch.description: Live pitch control. 0.50 matches vanilla; larger values look more top-down.

farthestZoom.label: Farthest zoom
farthestZoom.description: Lower values show more of the world. Vanilla far limit is 0.3.

closestZoom.label: Closest zoom
closestZoom.description: Higher values zoom closer to the world. Vanilla near limit is 2.

fallbackZoom.label: Fallback zoom
fallbackZoom.description: Used when the saved zoom value is missing or invalid.

description: Combines view distance limits, dynamic camera projection, ending skip, accessibility buttons, reduced-flashes layer preference, stabilizer surge flash reduction, gradient mine flash suppression, offline earnings simulation control, void return fade skip, resource glow colors, chasm line rendering, floor grid outlines, play-time counter, Shift/Ctrl zoom shortcut control, and explainer fixes into one multi-entry quality mod.

sch.name: 优化和修复
sch.description: 优化和修复游戏中的部分内容。

enableEndingSkip.label: 结局跳过
enableEndingSkip.description: 新增在结局和致谢名单的跳过功能。

enableAccessibilityButtons.label: 游戏内设置按钮
enableAccessibilityButtons.description: 鼠标移动到底部中间时会弹出设置按钮。

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: 禁用稳定器触发浪涌时的闪烁
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: 在建造虚空祭坛之后，也禁用稳定器激活浪涌效果时产生的全频闪烁。

enableResourceGlowColors.label: 资源发光颜色
enableResourceGlowColors.description: 新增默认根据资源的颜色改变对应资源发光颜色，并支持自定义。

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: 游戏时长显示
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: 在游戏里显示当前存档的游玩时长。

playTimeCounterPosition.label: 游戏时长位置
playTimeCounterPosition.description: 滑动选择右下角、顶部居中或左下角。

resourceGlowColors.label: 资源发光颜色自定义
resourceGlowColors.description: 可自定义设置每种资源的发光颜色。

enableViewDistance.label: 禁用视野距离限制
enableViewDistance.description: 可修改原版游戏的视角的远近限制。

farthestZoom.label: 最远视角距离
farthestZoom.description: 数值越低，可看到的世界范围越大。原版最远限制为 0.3。

closestZoom.label: 最近视角距离
closestZoom.description: 数值越高，镜头可以拉得越近。原版最近限制为 2。

fallbackZoom.label: 默认缩放
fallbackZoom.description: 当保存的缩放值缺失或无效时使用。

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: 逆裂缝绘线渲染模式切换
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: 新增并可切换WebGL逆裂缝绘线的渲染方式，以提升性能。

chasmLineRendererMode.label: 渲染模式
chasmLineRendererMode.description: 原版渲染方式为Canvas 2D。可切换至WebGL渲染模式，用GPU进行渲染以提升性能。

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: 无视距离渲染逆裂缝绘线
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: 无论距离多远，逆裂缝的绘线都会保持渲染。

enableFloorGridLines.label: 地板方格边框显示
enableFloorGridLines.description: 新增地板方格边框，方便数格子。

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: 现实维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: 留空时现实世界使用默认深灰色边框。

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: 虚空维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: 留空时虚空世界使用默认白色边框。

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: 禁用回到现实白屏淡出效果
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: 从虚空维度返回现实维度时，移除长时间的白色淡出效果，直接显示清晰画面。

enableExplainerFix.label: 提示句修复
enableExplainerFix.description: 修复提示语在切换语言后不刷新，并让虚空世界里的提示文字变成亮色以便看清。

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: 禁用 Shift/Ctrl 单按缩放
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: 阻止单独按下 Shift 或 Ctrl 时重置镜头缩放，同时保留 Shift/Ctrl + 滚轮缩放。

enableDynamicCamera.label: 动态镜头
enableDynamicCamera.description: 启用可用快捷键控制的镜头倾斜和旋转。

cameraPitch.label: 镜头倾斜角度
cameraPitch.description: 实时调整倾斜角度。0.50 等于原版；数值越大越接近俯视。

cameraYaw.label: 镜头旋转角度
cameraYaw.description: 实时调整旋转角度，单位为度。

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: 禁用梯度矿井频闪
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: 阻止梯度矿井在虚空维度转化 Reality 时产生的全屏闪烁，但保留闪电路径、音效和资源产出。

disableIdleSplash.label: 禁用离线收益模拟
disableIdleSplash.description: 读取存档时跳过离线收益模拟。离开游戏期间不会获得任何离线资源，也不会产生其他模拟进度。

modsch.name: 优化和修复
modsch.description: 优化和修复游戏中的部分内容。

enableEndingSkip.description: 新增在结局和致谢名单的跳过功能。

enableAccessibilityButtons.description: 鼠标移动到底部中间时会弹出设置按钮。

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: 禁用稳定器触发浪涌时的闪烁
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: 在建造虚空祭坛之后，也禁用稳定器激活浪涌效果时产生的全频闪烁。

enableResourceGlowColors.description: 新增默认根据资源的颜色改变对应资源发光颜色，并支持自定义。

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: 游戏时长显示
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: 在游戏里显示当前存档的游玩时长。

playTimeCounterPosition.label: 游戏时长位置
playTimeCounterPosition.description: 滑动选择右下角、顶部居中或左下角。

resourceGlowColors.label: 资源发光颜色调色板
resourceGlowColors.description: 可自定义设置每周资源的发光颜色。

enableViewDistance.label: 禁用视野距离限制
enableViewDistance.description: 可修改原版游戏的视角的远近限制。

farthestZoom.label: 最远视角距离
farthestZoom.description: 数值越低，可看到的世界范围越大。原版最远限制为 0.3。

closestZoom.label: 最近视角距离
closestZoom.description: 数值越高，镜头可以拉得越近。原版最近限制为 2。

fallbackZoom.label: 默认缩放
fallbackZoom.description: 当保存的缩放值缺失或无效时使用。

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: 逆裂缝绘线渲染模式切换
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: 新增并可切换WebGL逆裂缝绘线的渲染方式，以提升性能。

chasmLineRendererMode.label: 渲染模式
chasmLineRendererMode.description: 原版渲染方式为Canvas 2D。可切换至WebGL渲染模式，用GPU进行渲染以提升性能。

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: 无视距离渲染逆裂缝绘线
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: 无论距离多远，逆裂缝的绘线都会保持渲染。

enableFloorGridLines.label: 显示地板方格边框
enableFloorGridLines.description: 新增地板方格边框，方便数格子。

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: 现实维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: 留空时现实世界使用默认深灰色边框。

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: 虚空维度地板方格边框颜色
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: 留空时虚空世界使用默认白色边框。

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: 禁用回到现实白屏淡出效果
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: 从虚空维度返回现实维度时，移除长时间的白色淡出效果，直接显示清晰画面。

enableExplainerFix.label: 提示句修复
enableExplainerFix.description: 修复提示语在切换语言后不刷新，并让虚空世界里的提示文字变成亮色以便看清。

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: 禁用 Shift/Ctrl 单按缩放
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: 阻止单独按下 Shift 或 Ctrl 时重置镜头缩放，同时保留 Shift/Ctrl + 滚轮缩放。

enableDynamicCamera.label: 动态镜头
enableDynamicCamera.description: 启用可用快捷键控制的镜头倾斜和旋转。

cameraPitch.label: 镜头倾斜角度
cameraPitch.description: 实时调整倾斜角度。0.50 等于原版；数值越大越接近俯视。

cameraYaw.label: 镜头旋转角度
cameraYaw.description: 实时调整旋转角度，单位为度。

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: 禁用梯度矿井频闪
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: 阻止梯度矿井在虚空维度转化 Reality 时产生的全屏闪烁，但保留闪电路径、音效和资源产出。

disableIdleSplash.label: 禁用离线收益模拟
disableIdleSplash.description: 读取存档时跳过离线收益模拟。离开游戏期间不会获得任何离线资源，也不会产生其他模拟进度。

en.name: Tweaks

enableEndingSkip.label: Ending skip
enableEndingSkip.description: Show a skip button during the pinhole ending and credits sequence.

enableAccessibilityButtons.label: Accessibility buttons
enableAccessibilityButtons.description: Show the bottom accessibility control bar and reality-floor color palette.

enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.label: Stabilizer surge flash reduction
enableStabilizerSurgeFlashReduction.description: After the void altar exists, hide full-screen flashes caused by stabilizer-triggered surge effects.

enableResourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow colors
enableResourceGlowColors.description: Color resource icon glows by resource, with optional per-resource overrides.

enablePlayTimeCounter.label: Play time counter
enablePlayTimeCounter.description: Show the active run play-time counter on the game canvas.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Play time counter position
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

resourceGlowColors.label: Resource glow palette
resourceGlowColors.description: Per-resource glow color overrides. Empty rows use each resource's native color.

farthestZoom.label: Farthest zoom
farthestZoom.description: Lower values show more of the world. Vanilla far limit is 0.3.

closestZoom.label: Closest zoom
closestZoom.description: Higher values zoom closer to the world. Vanilla near limit is 2.

fallbackZoom.label: Fallback zoom
fallbackZoom.description: Used when the saved zoom value is missing or invalid.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Chasm line renderer
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Allow this mod to replace the chasm-to-resource lines with the selected renderer.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Chasm line rendering mode
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D uses the original game drawing. WebGL renders the same chasm-to-resource curves through a GPU-backed canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Chasm lines ignore distance
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Keep rendering chasm-to-resource lines even when the chasm is outside the normal visible range.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Floor grid outlines
enableFloorGridLines.description: Draw thin outlines around the in-game floor cells.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Reality floor grid outline color
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Leave empty to use the default dark gray outline in reality.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Void floor grid outline color
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Leave empty to use the default white outline in the void.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Skip void return fade
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: When returning from the void to reality, remove the long white recovery fade and show the clear view immediately.

enableExplainerFix.label: Explainer fix
enableExplainerFix.description: Refresh pulsing explainer hints after language changes and use readable light text in the void.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Disable Shift/Ctrl zoom shortcut
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Prevent pressing Shift or Ctrl alone from resetting the camera zoom, while keeping Shift/Ctrl + wheel zooming available.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Dynamic camera
enableDynamicCamera.description: Enable keyboard-controlled camera pitch and rotation.

cameraPitch.label: Camera pitch
cameraPitch.description: Live pitch control. 0.50 matches vanilla; larger values look more top-down.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Disable gradient mine flash
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Prevent Gradient mine Reality conversion lightning from filling the screen, while keeping the lightning path, sound, and resource production.

disableIdleSplash.label: Disable offline earnings simulation
disableIdleSplash.description: Skip the offline earnings simulation when loading a save. Time spent away will grant no offline resources or other simulated progress.

en.description: Combines view distance limits, ending skip, accessibility buttons, stabilizer surge flash reduction, void return fade skip, resource glow colors, chasm line rendering, floor grid outlines, play-time counter, and explainer fixes into one multi-entry quality mod.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Позиция счетчика времени
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Render lines chasm
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Allow the mod to replace chasm-to-resource lines with the selected renderer.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Chasm line render mode
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D uses original drawing. WebGL uses a GPU-backed canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Linii razloma bez distantsii
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Linii ot razloma k resursam risuyutsya, dazhe kogda razlom vne obychnoy vidimoy zony.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Kontury kletok pola
enableFloorGridLines.description: Risuet tonkie kontury vokrug kletok pola v igre.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Tsvet setki pola realnosti
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Pustoe znachenie ispolzuet temno-seryy kontur v realnosti.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Tsvet setki pola pustoty
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Pustoe znachenie ispolzuet belyy kontur v pustote.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Propusk belogo zatuhaniya iz pustoty
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Pri vozvrate iz pustoty v realnost ubiraet dolgoe beloe vosstanovlenie i srazu pokazyvaet chetkiy vid.

enableExplainerFix.label: Ispravlenie podskazok
enableExplainerFix.description: Obnovlyaet pulsiruyushchie podskazki posle smeny yazyka i delaet tekst svetlym v pustote.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Otklyuchit Shift/Ctrl zoom
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Ne pozvolyaet odinochnomu Shift ili Ctrl sbrosit masshtab kamery, no ostavlyaet Shift/Ctrl + koleso.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Dinamicheskaya kamera
enableDynamicCamera.description: Vklyuchaet naklon i povorot kamery s upravleniem klavishami.

cameraPitch.label: Naklon kamery
cameraPitch.description: Zhivaya nastroika naklona. 0.50 kak v originale; bolshe znachit vid sverkhu.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Otklyuchit mertsanie gradientnoy shakhty
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Ubiraet polnoekrannuyu vspyshku molnii pri preobrazovanii Reality gradientnoy shakhtoy, sohranyaya liniyu molnii, zvuk i proizvodstvo resursov.

disableIdleSplash.label: Otklyuchit simulyatsiyu oflayn-dokhoda
disableIdleSplash.description: Pri zagruzke sokhraneniya propuskaet simulyatsiyu oflayn-dokhoda. Za vremya vne igry ne budut nachisleny resursy ili drugoy smodelirovannyy progress.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Position des Spielzeitzählers
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Risslinien-Renderer
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Erlaubt dem Mod, die Linien zwischen Riss und Ressourcen mit dem gewaehlten Renderer zu ersetzen.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Risslinien-Renderingmodus
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D nutzt die originale Zeichnung. WebGL nutzt eine GPU-Canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Kluftlinien ohne Distanzlimit
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Zeichnet Linien von Kluft zu Ressourcen weiter, auch wenn die Kluft ausserhalb der normalen Sichtweite liegt.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Bodenraster-Umrisse
enableFloorGridLines.description: Zeichnet duenne Umrisse um die Bodenfelder im Spiel.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Bodenrasterfarbe Realitaet
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Leer lassen fuer die dunkelgraue Standardlinie in der Realitaet.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Bodenrasterfarbe Leere
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Leer lassen fuer die weisse Standardlinie in der Leere.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Rueckkehr-Fade aus der Leere ueberspringen
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Beim Zurueckkehren aus der Leere zur Realitaet wird die lange weisse Aufhellung entfernt.

enableExplainerFix.label: Hinweis-Fix
enableExplainerFix.description: Aktualisiert pulsierende Hinweise nach Sprachwechseln und nutzt gut lesbaren hellen Text in der Leere.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Shift/Ctrl-Zoom deaktivieren
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Verhindert, dass Shift oder Ctrl allein den Kamerazoom zuruecksetzt, laesst aber Shift/Ctrl + Mausrad aktiv.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Dynamische Kamera
enableDynamicCamera.description: Aktiviert Kameraneigung und Drehung per Tastatur.

cameraPitch.label: Kameraneigung
cameraPitch.description: Live-Neigung. 0.50 entspricht Vanilla; hoehere Werte wirken mehr von oben.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Gradientminen-Blitz deaktivieren
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Verhindert den Vollbildblitz bei der Reality-Umwandlung der Gradientmine, behalt aber Blitzpfad, Ton und Ressourcenproduktion.

disableIdleSplash.label: Offline-Ertragssimulation deaktivieren
disableIdleSplash.description: Überspringt beim Laden eines Spielstands die Offline-Ertragssimulation. Für die Zeit außerhalb des Spiels werden weder Ressourcen noch anderer simulierter Fortschritt gewährt.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Posição do contador de tempo
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Renderizador das linhas da fenda
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Permite trocar as linhas entre a fenda e os recursos pelo renderizador escolhido.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Modo das linhas da fenda
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D usa o desenho original. WebGL usa uma tela acelerada por GPU.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Linhas da fenda sem limite
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Mantem as linhas da fenda para os recursos mesmo quando a fenda esta fora do alcance visivel normal.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Contornos da grade do piso
enableFloorGridLines.description: Desenha contornos finos nas celulas do piso do jogo.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Cor da grade do piso na realidade
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Vazio usa o contorno cinza escuro padrao na realidade.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Cor da grade do piso no vazio
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Vazio usa o contorno branco padrao no vazio.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Pular fade ao voltar do vazio
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Ao voltar do vazio para a realidade, remove o longo fade branco e mostra a tela nitida imediatamente.

enableExplainerFix.label: Correcao dos avisos
enableExplainerFix.description: Atualiza avisos pulsantes apos mudar o idioma e usa texto claro legivel no vazio.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Desativar zoom Shift/Ctrl
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Impede Shift ou Ctrl sozinho de redefinir o zoom da camera, mantendo Shift/Ctrl + roda.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Camera dinamica
enableDynamicCamera.description: Ativa inclinacao e rotacao da camera por teclado.

cameraPitch.label: Inclinacao da camera
cameraPitch.description: Controle ao vivo. 0.50 equivale ao original; valores maiores ficam mais de cima.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Desativar flash da mina gradiente
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Impede que o raio de conversao de Reality da mina gradiente preencha a tela, mantendo caminho do raio, som e producao de recursos.

disableIdleSplash.label: Desativar simulação de ganhos offline
disableIdleSplash.description: Ignora a simulação de ganhos offline ao carregar um jogo salvo. O tempo fora do jogo não concederá recursos nem outro progresso simulado.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Posizione contatore tempo
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Renderer linee fenditura
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Permette al mod di sostituire le linee tra fenditura e risorse con il renderer scelto.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Modo rendering linee fenditura
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D usa il disegno originale. WebGL usa una canvas GPU.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Linee frattura senza distanza
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Continua a disegnare le linee dalla frattura alle risorse anche fuori dal normale campo visibile.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Contorni griglia pavimento
enableFloorGridLines.description: Disegna contorni sottili attorno alle celle del pavimento.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Colore griglia pavimento realta
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Vuoto usa il contorno grigio scuro predefinito nella realta.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Colore griglia pavimento vuoto
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Vuoto usa il contorno bianco predefinito nel vuoto.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Salta dissolvenza ritorno dal vuoto
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Quando torni dal vuoto alla realta, rimuove la lunga dissolvenza bianca e mostra subito la vista chiara.

enableExplainerFix.label: Correzione suggerimenti
enableExplainerFix.description: Aggiorna i suggerimenti pulsanti dopo il cambio lingua e usa testo chiaro leggibile nel vuoto.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Disattiva zoom Shift/Ctrl
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Evita che Shift o Ctrl da soli ripristinino lo zoom, mantenendo Shift/Ctrl + rotellina.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Camera dinamica
enableDynamicCamera.description: Abilita inclinazione e rotazione della camera da tastiera.

cameraPitch.label: Inclinazione camera
cameraPitch.description: Controllo live. 0.50 corrisponde al vanilla; valori piu alti sono piu dall alto.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Disattiva lampo miniera gradiente
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Evita il lampo a schermo intero della conversione Reality della miniera gradiente, mantenendo linea del fulmine, audio e produzione.

disableIdleSplash.label: Disattiva simulazione guadagni offline
disableIdleSplash.description: Salta la simulazione dei guadagni offline quando carichi un salvataggio. Il tempo trascorso fuori dal gioco non fornirà risorse né altri progressi simulati.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Posición del contador de tiempo
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Renderizador de lineas de grieta
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Permite reemplazar las lineas entre la grieta y los recursos con el renderizador elegido.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Modo de lineas de grieta
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D usa el dibujo original. WebGL usa un lienzo con GPU.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Lineas de grieta sin distancia
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Mantiene las lineas de la grieta a los recursos aunque la grieta este fuera del rango visible normal.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Bordes de cuadricula del suelo
enableFloorGridLines.description: Dibuja bordes finos alrededor de las celdas del suelo.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Color de cuadricula en realidad
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Vacio usa el borde gris oscuro predeterminado en realidad.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Color de cuadricula en vacio
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Vacio usa el borde blanco predeterminado en el vacio.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Omitir fundido al volver del vacio
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Al volver del vacio a la realidad, elimina el largo fundido blanco y muestra la vista clara de inmediato.

enableExplainerFix.label: Correccion de avisos
enableExplainerFix.description: Actualiza los avisos pulsantes tras cambiar idioma y usa texto claro legible en el vacio.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Desactivar zoom Shift/Ctrl
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Evita que Shift o Ctrl solos reinicien el zoom, pero mantiene Shift/Ctrl + rueda.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Camara dinamica
enableDynamicCamera.description: Activa inclinacion y rotacion de la camara con teclado.

cameraPitch.label: Inclinacion de camara
cameraPitch.description: Control en vivo. 0.50 coincide con vanilla; valores mayores se ven mas desde arriba.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Desactivar destello mina gradiente
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Evita que el rayo de conversion de Reality de la mina gradiente llene la pantalla, manteniendo trayectoria, sonido y produccion.

disableIdleSplash.label: Desactivar simulación de ganancias offline
disableIdleSplash.description: Omite la simulación de ganancias offline al cargar una partida. El tiempo fuera del juego no otorgará recursos ni otros progresos simulados.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Position du compteur de temps
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Rendu des lignes de faille
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Permet de remplacer les lignes entre la faille et les ressources par le rendu choisi.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Mode de rendu des lignes de faille
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D utilise le dessin original. WebGL utilise un canvas GPU.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Lignes de faille sans distance
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Continue a dessiner les lignes faille-ressources meme si la faille est hors de la portee visible normale.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Contours de grille du sol
enableFloorGridLines.description: Dessine de fins contours autour des cases du sol.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Couleur de grille en realite
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Vide utilise le contour gris fonce par defaut en realite.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Couleur de grille du vide
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Vide utilise le contour blanc par defaut dans le vide.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Ignorer le fondu de retour du vide
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Au retour du vide vers la realite, supprime le long fondu blanc et affiche tout de suite une vue nette.

enableExplainerFix.label: Correctif des indices
enableExplainerFix.description: Actualise les indices pulses apres les changements de langue et utilise un texte clair lisible dans le vide.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Desactiver le zoom Shift/Ctrl
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Empeche Shift ou Ctrl seuls de reinitialiser le zoom, tout en gardant Shift/Ctrl + molette.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Camera dynamique
enableDynamicCamera.description: Active inclinaison et rotation de camera au clavier.

cameraPitch.label: Inclinaison camera
cameraPitch.description: Controle en direct. 0.50 correspond au jeu original; plus haut donne une vue plus verticale.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Desactiver flash mine gradient
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Empeche l eclair de conversion de Reality de la mine gradient de remplir l ecran, tout en gardant le trajet, le son et la production.

disableIdleSplash.label: Désactiver la simulation des gains hors ligne
disableIdleSplash.description: Ignore la simulation des gains hors ligne lors du chargement d'une sauvegarde. Le temps passé hors du jeu n'accordera aucune ressource ni autre progression simulée.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Positie speeltijdteller
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Klooflijnen-renderer
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Laat de mod de lijnen tussen kloof en grondstoffen vervangen door de gekozen renderer.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Renderstand klooflijnen
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D gebruikt de originele tekening. WebGL gebruikt een GPU-canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Klooflijnen negeren afstand
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Blijft lijnen van kloof naar grondstoffen tekenen, ook buiten het normale zichtbereik.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Vloerraster-omtrekken
enableFloorGridLines.description: Tekent dunne omtrekken rond vloercellen.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Vloerrasterkleur realiteit
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Leeg gebruikt de standaard donkergrijze omtrek in realiteit.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Vloerrasterkleur leegte
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Leeg gebruikt de standaard witte omtrek in de leegte.

enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.label: Witte fade na leegte overslaan
enableVoidReturnFadeSkip.description: Bij terugkeer uit de leegte naar realiteit wordt de lange witte fade verwijderd.

enableExplainerFix.label: Hint-fix
enableExplainerFix.description: Vernieuwt pulserende hints na taalwijzigingen en gebruikt leesbare lichte tekst in de leegte.

disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.label: Shift/Ctrl-zoom uitschakelen
disableShiftCtrlZoomShortcut.description: Voorkomt dat Shift of Ctrl alleen de camerazoom reset, maar behoudt Shift/Ctrl + muiswiel.

enableDynamicCamera.label: Dynamische camera
enableDynamicCamera.description: Schakelt camerakanteling en rotatie via toetsenbord in.

cameraPitch.label: Camerakanteling
cameraPitch.description: Live kanteling. 0.50 is vanilla; hogere waarden lijken meer van boven.

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Gradientmijnflits uitschakelen
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Voorkomt dat de Reality-omzettingsbliksem van de gradientmijn het scherm vult, met behoud van bliksempad, geluid en productie.

disableIdleSplash.label: Offline-opbrengstsimulatie uitschakelen
disableIdleSplash.description: Slaat de offline-opbrengstsimulatie over bij het laden van een opgeslagen spel. Tijd buiten het spel levert geen grondstoffen of andere gesimuleerde voortgang op.

playTimeCounterPosition.label: Poloha počítadla času
playTimeCounterPosition.description: Slide between bottom-left, top-center, and bottom-right.

enableChasmLineRenderer.label: Vykreslovani car prurvy
enableChasmLineRenderer.description: Umoznuje modu nahradit cary mezi prurvou a surovinami zvolenym rendererem.

chasmLineRendererMode.label: Rezim vykreslovani car prurvy
chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D pouziva puvodni kresleni. WebGL pouziva GPU canvas.

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.label: Cary prurvy bez vzdalenosti
enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: Cary mezi prurvou a surovinami se kresli i mimo bezny viditelny dosah.

enableFloorGridLines.label: Obrysy mrizky podlahy
enableFloorGridLines.description: Kresli tenke obrysy okolo policek podlahy.

floorGridLineRealityColor.label: Barva mrizky podlahy reality
floorGridLineRealityColor.description: Prazdne pouzije vychozi tmave sedy obrys v realite.

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: Barva mrizky podlahy prazdnoty
floorGridLineVoidColor.description: Prazdne pouzije vychozi bily obrys v prazdnote.

chasmLineRendererMode.description: Canvas 2D 使用原版繪製。WebGL 使用 GPU 畫布渲染同樣的逆裂縫到資源曲線。

enableChasmLineDistanceOverride.description: 開啟後，視角離逆裂縫較遠時仍繼續渲染逆裂縫與資源之間的連線。

floorGridLineVoidColor.label: 虛空世界地板方格邊框顏色

enableDynamicCamera.label: 動態鏡頭

cameraPitch.label: 鏡頭傾斜角度
cameraPitch.description: 即時調整傾斜角度。0.50 等於原版；數值越大越接近俯視。

cameraYaw.label: 鏡頭旋轉角度
cameraYaw.description: 即時調整旋轉角度，單位為度。

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: 停用梯度礦井頻閃
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: 防止梯度礦井在虛空維度轉化 Reality 時產生全螢幕閃爍，但保留閃電路徑、音效和資源產出。

disableIdleSplash.label: 停用離線收益模擬
disableIdleSplash.description: 讀取存檔時跳過離線收益模擬。離開遊戲期間不會獲得任何離線資源，也不會產生其他模擬進度。

disableGradientLightningFlash.label: Deaktiver gradientgruveblink
disableGradientLightningFlash.description: Hindrer Reality-konverteringslyn fra gradientgruven i a fylle skjermen, men beholder lynbane, lyd og produksjon.

disableIdleSplash.label: Deaktiver simulering av offline-inntekter
disableIdleSplash.description: Hopper over simuleringen av offline-inntekter når et lagret spill lastes. Tid borte fra spillet gir ingen ressurser eller annen simulert fremgang.
